HOW TO GET SQUISHY

01

CREATE WALLET

Download Phantom or Solflare. Keep your seed phrase safer than a fresh lump of clay!

02

GET SOME SOL

Buy SOL from an exchange and send it to your wallet. You'll need it to sculpt your $CLAY.

03

GO TO PUMPFUN

Connect your wallet to Pump.fun and search for the $CLAY ticker.

04

SWAP FOR $CLAY

Press buy and hold on tight! Your portfolio is about to get a 3D makeover.

THE CLAYMATION MANIFESTO

The ultimate degen currency for clay-loving degenerates! Smash it, mold it, and stake it in our crazy 3D adventures. Will your portfolio be squished or sculpted? Get ready to take a slippery slide into the claymation madness! We aren't just a coin; we're a living, breathing lump of digital art that refuses to stay in the box.
